summary: Iteration 189 Testing Complete - UI/UX Overhaul with 11 Features verified. 17/17 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend features tested and working correctly.

issues: 'Missing API Keys' modal appears on all pages - expected behavior warning about optional integrations
RyAI analysis labels show 'No AI review' instead of 'RyAI: Suspicious/Legitimate' - expected since no AI reviews have been performed on pending proofs yet
Leaderboard modal shows 'No leaderboard data yet' - expected empty state

FEATURE_1_streak_in_share.description: Share Performance modal now shows Streak value (49 days) - bug fix verified

FEATURE_2_hub_store_renamed.description: Store renamed to Hub Store with Signal Gate Immunity section

FEATURE_3_collapsible_sidebar.description: Sidebar has collapsible categories: CORE, GROWTH, REWARDS, COMMUNITY, TOOLS, ADMIN

FEATURE_4_streak_freezes_section.description: Hub Store page shows Streak Freezes section with Trade Streak Freeze (200 pts) and Habit Streak Freeze (150 pts)

FEATURE_5_invite_and_earn.description: My Team page has Invite & Earn card at top with referral link and Copy button

FEATURE_6_leaderboard_modal.description: My Rewards page has 'View Leaderboard' button that opens modal (shows empty state if no data)

FEATURE_7_ai_assistant.description: AI Assistant page loads with CrossCurrent AI persona (RyAI + zxAI engines)

FEATURE_8_notification_badges.description: Admin category in sidebar shows badge counter (3) for pending actions

FEATURE_9_find_a_member.description: Admin Dashboard has 'Find a Member' search that returns lookup results

FEATURE_10_dashboard_quick_actions.description: Dashboard shows 4 stat cards: Account Value, Total Profit, Total Trades, Actual vs Projected

FEATURE_11_enhanced_performance.description: Dashboard Performance Overview shows enhanced stats with chart and performance metrics

BACKEND_admin_members_route.description: GET /api/admin/members route extracted to admin_members_routes.py and working correctly

BACKEND_pending_proofs.description: GET /api/habits/admin/pending-proofs returns completions with ai_review field support

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 189 complete. All 11 UI/UX overhaul features verified: (1) Streak fixed in Share Performance showing 49 days, (2) Hub Store with Signal Gate Immunity + Streak Freezes sections, (3) Collapsible accordion sidebar categories, (4) Leaderboard modal in My Rewards, (5) Invite & Earn card in My Team with referral link, (6) Rewards category in nav, (7) AI Assistant with RyAI+zxAI engines, (8) Admin badge counter showing 3, (9) Find a Member search in Admin Dashboard, (10) Dashboard quick stat cards, (11) Enhanced Performance Overview. Rewards Platform sync is MOCKED. OpenRouter AI has fallback to rule-based recommendations.
mocked_api_note: Rewards Platform sync_user_to_rewards_platform is MOCKED. OpenRouter AI is used for team recommendations but has fallback to rule-based suggestions if API key is missing or call fails.
